overview.description: The Nicholas Crypto Income ETF (BLOX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed fund that consists of crypto companies stocks, underlying funds that provide exposure to bitcoin and ether, and an options overlay. The fund does not invest directly in cryptocurrencies. BLOX was launched on Jun 17, 2025 and is issued by Nicholas.
